description_en:
After months of knocking doors, making calls, attending community events, and listening to residents across Ward 1, Jackie Reyes-Yanes invites volunteers, supporters, neighbors, families, seniors, young people, and small business owners to join her Election Night Community Celebration at Haydee’s Restaurant.

Come celebrate the movement, the community, and the people who made this campaign possible.
title_en: Jackie Reyes-Yanes Election Night Community Celebration at Haydee’s Restaurant
description_es:
Después de meses tocando puertas, haciendo llamadas, participando en eventos comunitarios y escuchando a residentes de todo Ward 1, Jackie Reyes-Yanes invita a voluntarios, simpatizantes, vecinos, familias, adultos mayores, jóvenes y pequeños negocios a acompañarla en su Celebración Comunitaria de la Noche Electoral en Haydee’s Restaurant.

Ven a celebrar este movimiento, nuestra comunidad y a las personas que hicieron posible esta campaña.
address_en: Haydee's Restaurant, 3102 Mt Pleasant St NW
title_es: Celebración Comunitaria de la Noche Electoral con Jackie Reyes-Yanes
address_es: Haydee's Restaurant, 3102 Mt Pleasant St NW
